vecode.name: Vecode — Critical Port Platform Re-Architecture
vecode.context: Radical Transformation: I inherited a critical operating infrastructure built in procedural PHP (a 110+ file monolith) with unacceptable latencies. I performed a **from-scratch** reconstruction in 4 months, migrating to a modern service-oriented architecture to guarantee real-time weighing and inventory.
vecode.p1_desc: Eliminated legacy 'Spaghetti Code' by architecting a robust REST API in Laravel 11. Implemented MVC patterns, advanced SQL injection security, and data abstraction via Eloquent ORM, achieving a scalable and maintainable system.
vecode.p2_desc: Developed the entire frontend in React 18 & Inertia.js. We optimized final-user latency by eliminating constant page reloads, integrating TailwindCSS for a modern industrial design.
vecode.p3_desc: Migrated operations to Linux servers optimized with CloudPanel and automated the software supply chain via GitHub Actions, reducing cloud costs and response times by 50%.

stealth.name: Deep Tech Startup — Autonomous Computer Vision
stealth.context: Draft Survey Disruption: The century-old process of certifying vessel weight is dangerous and manual. I founded this startup to fully automate it using AI and drones, achieving sub-centimeter precision in seconds and eliminating human risks.
stealth.p1_desc: AI pipeline integrating instance segmentation and industrial OCR to read draft marks under heavy rust and wave conditions. Developed the physical algorithm that reconstructs 'True Still Water Level' via advanced mathematical transforms.
stealth.p2_desc: 'Offline-First' strategy for high-seas operations. AI processing happens at the edge with asynchronous cloud synchronization when connectivity is available, ensuring total operability without internet.
stealth.p3_desc: Tactical interface designed for high-stress environments. Integrated drone control, real-time telemetry, and automatic generation of industry-first photorealistic evidentiary certificates.
stealth.p4_desc: Enterprise SaaS business modeling with DNV technical certifications in progress. I combined maritime logistics domain fluency with high-level Full-Stack engineering to create a unique-in-market solution.

rows.capabilities: Segmentation, Detection, Industrial OCR, Synthetic Data (GAN/Diffusion).
Physical noise cancellation, statistical validation, dynamic modeling.
Asynchronous systems, Secure REST APIs (JWT), Large-scale Migrations.
Highly Reactive SPAs, Offline-First PWA, i18n, Industrial UX.
